sandwiches.name: The Classical Jambon-Beurre
sandwiches.description: A timeless Parisian classic featuring a crisp French baguette generously spread with salted butter and filled with delicate slices of Paris ham. Simple, elegant, and considered one of the most iconic sandwiches in France.

sandwiches.name: Croque-Monsieur
sandwiches.description: A beloved French bistro specialty made with toasted bread, premium ham, melted Emmental cheese, and a creamy béchamel sauce. Crispy on the outside and irresistibly rich on the inside.

sandwiches.name: Montreal Smoked Meat
sandwiches.description: An iconic Canadian sandwich piled high with hand-sliced smoked brisket that has been cured, seasoned, and slowly smoked for maximum flavor. Traditionally served on rye bread with a generous layer of mustard.

sandwiches.name: Poulet Crudités
sandwiches.description: A fresh and satisfying sandwich commonly found in French bakeries, combining tender roasted chicken, crisp lettuce, grated carrots, and creamy mayonnaise inside a crunchy artisan baguette.

sandwiches.name: Américain
sandwiches.description: A popular Belgian sandwich loaded with seasoned beef, Emmental cheese, fresh tomatoes, and crunchy salad. Finished with a flavorful cocktail sauce for a rich and satisfying bite.

sandwiches.name: Thon Crudités
sandwiches.description: A Mediterranean-inspired sandwich featuring tuna, fresh tomatoes, crisp salad, and creamy mayonnaise. Light yet flavorful, it is a staple in many bakeries along the French coast.

sandwiches.name: Poulet Emmental
sandwiches.description: A generous sandwich featuring grilled chicken breast, nutty Emmental cheese, ripe tomatoes, and crisp lettuce. A balanced combination of freshness and richness served on artisan bread.

breads.name: The French Baguette
breads.description: The iconic French baguette features a crisp golden crust and a light, airy crumb. Its simple recipe highlights the quality of its ingredients, making it the perfect companion for sandwiches, cheese, and charcuterie.

breads.name: Brioche Bun
breads.description: Rich, buttery, and slightly sweet, the brioche bun is known for its soft texture and golden color. It is especially popular for gourmet burgers and premium sandwiches.

breads.name: White Bread
breads.description: A classic everyday bread with a soft texture and mild flavor. White bread is one of the world's most widely consumed breads and serves as a versatile base for countless sandwich combinations.

breads.name: Rye Bread
breads.description: Made with rye flour, this bread offers a distinctive earthy flavor and dense texture. It pairs particularly well with smoked meats, cured fish, and strong cheeses.

breads.name: Country Wheat Baguette
breads.description: This rustic French baguette combines whole wheat and white flour to create a deeper flavor profile. Its hearty crumb and crisp crust make it ideal for artisan sandwiches and picnic-style meals.

breads.name: Rustic Lyonnais Loaf
breads.description: Inspired by traditional bakeries around Lyon, this loaf features a robust crust and complex flavor developed through slow fermentation. It complements rich fillings and gourmet ingredients beautifully.

breads.name: Belgian Sandwich Roll
breads.description: Soft, light, and easy to slice, this Belgian-style sandwich roll is designed to hold a variety of fillings while maintaining its shape. Its mild flavor makes it a versatile choice for everyday sandwiches.

breads.name: Mediterranean Bakery Bread
breads.description: A light and aromatic bread inspired by Mediterranean baking traditions. Its crisp exterior and tender interior make it a refreshing option for sandwiches filled with vegetables, cheeses, and cured meats.
